headline: UBS Cuts PT on Southwest Airlines Co. (LUV) to $56 From $59 – Here’s Why
summary: Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE:LUV) is one of the best affordable stocks to buy with good earnings growth. UBS cut the price target on Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE:LUV) to $56 from $59 on March 23, reiterating a Buy rating on the shares. The firm told investors in a research note that jet fuel prices have risen […]

headline: Amazon, Delta team up for in-flight Wi-Fi, challenging Musk's Starlink
summary: By Joey Roulette CAPE CANAVERAL, March 31 (Reuters) - Amazon's Leo satellite internet unit signed a deal with Delta Air Lines to provide in-flight Wi-Fi on 500 of the airline's planes starting in 2028

headline: Delta to Tap Amazon Satellite-Internet Service for In-Flight Wi-Fi
summary: Amazon’s Leo service will start connecting a portion of Delta’s fleet in 2028; Elon Musk’s Starlink has become a dominant satellite connectivity provider to airlines.

raw.headline: Delta to Tap Amazon Satellite-Internet Service for In-Flight Wi-Fi
